description: Freshness: a child_binding_sig produced over a PRIOR attempt's provisioning_nonce MUST be refused for the current session. The nonce is bound in two independent places — the attestation challenge (check 2) and the JCS binding body (check 4b) — so a replayed binding from an earlier pair attempt fails against the current single-use nonce. Refused + nonce burned (ADR-036 D4).

notes.check_2: leaf attestationChallenge == current provisioning_nonce — a stale challenge fails here first
notes.check_4b: the JCS body's provisioning_nonce is the current nonce (Base64Url.encode(session.nonce())); a signature made over an old nonce does not verify against the re-derived current body

expect: REFUSED + nonce burned (proven host-side in AttestationVerifierRealCryptoTest: signature over a prior nonce, verified against the current body)
